testcase.name: test_scanner_finds_files_in_real_tmpdir

error.message: failed on setup with "PermissionError: [WinError 5] Acesso negado: 'C:\\Users\\Ale e Mai\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-Família Santiago'"

item.session._setupstate.setup(item) C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\runner.py:523: in setup col.setup() C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\python.py:1723: in return self._hookexec(self.name, self._hookimpls.copy(), kwargs, firstresult) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\pluggy\_manager.py:120: in _hookexec return self._inner_hookexec(hook_name, methods, kwargs, firstresult) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\pluggy\_callers.py:38: in run_old_style_hookwrapper res = yield ^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\setuponly.py:36: in pytest_fixture_setup return (yield) ^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\fixtures.py:1202: in pytest_fixture_setup result = call_fixture_func(fixturefunc, request, kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\fixtures.py:908: in call_fixture_func fixture_result = next(generator) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\tmpdir.py:267: in tmp_path path = _mk_tmp(request, tmp_path_factory) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\tmpdir.py:254: in _mk_tmp return factory.mktemp(name, numbered=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\tmpdir.py:130: in mktemp basename = self._ensure_relative_to_basetemp(basename) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\tmpdir.py:111: in _ensure_relative_to_basetemp if (self.getbasetemp() / basename).resolve().parent != self.getbasetemp(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\tmpdir.py:186: in getbasetemp basetemp = make_numbered_dir_with_cleanup( C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\pathlib.py:407: in make_numbered_dir_with_cleanup raise e C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\pathlib.py:388: in make_numbered_dir_with_cleanup p = make_numbered_dir(root, prefix, mode) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\pathlib.py:229: in make_numbered_dir max_existing = max(map(parse_num, find_suffixes(root, prefix)), default=-1) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\pathlib.py:188: in extract_suffixes for entry in iter: ^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python314\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\pathlib.py:176: in find_prefixed for x in os.scandir(root): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E PermissionError: [WinError 5] Acesso negado: 'C:\\Users\\Ale e Mai\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pytest-of-Família Santiago'
